focus.title: 今日要览：4 个类目共 20 条更新
focus.body:
【AI 最新信息】Trump’s latest AI czar has already resigned
【金融新闻】2026世界人工智能大会暨人工智能全球治理高级别会议在沪闭幕
【中国新闻】一男子向纽约市一联邦大楼投掷燃烧装置被拘留
【世界新闻】Trump imposes 50% tariff on Canadian imports

items.title: Trump’s latest AI czar has already resigned
items.summary: The director role for the Center for AI Standards and Innovation (CAISI) has become a revolving door since David Sacks left his position as czar.

items.title: Google is working on a new AI chip designed to make Gemini more efficient
items.summary: Alphabet, Google's parent company, is reportedly working on a new chip designed to make its Gemini models run much more efficiently.

items.title: AI’s most important protocol is getting a little bit easier to use
items.summary: Under the new system, the protocol will take a looser, "stateless" approach to session IDs on the server side, similar to how most ordinary websites already wor

items.title: X relaunches a rebuilt Android app after year-long effort
items.summary: X says the rebuilt version of its Android app is now available globally.

items.title: OpenAI is scared of open-weight models. Should the US be?
items.summary: Talk of banning Chinese-made open-weight LLMs reveals the challenge of turning AI into a business.

items.title: 2026世界人工智能大会暨人工智能全球治理高级别会议在沪闭幕
items.summary: 中新社上海7月21日电 (记者 郑莹莹)为期4天的2026世界人工智能大会暨人工智能全球治理高级别会议20日在上海落下帷幕。

items.title: 出口持续增长、外贸占比提升、各路买家点赞——中国机电靠啥畅销海外？
items.summary: 从冰箱、空调、电风扇，到电极、光伏、挖掘机，中国机电产品日益成为全球消费者的重要选择。刚刚公布的外贸数据显示，今年上半年，我国出口机电产品9.36万亿元，增长20.1%，占出口总值的63.5%，较去年同期提升了3.5个百分点。自2025年3月起，机电出口已连续十多个月刷新同期月度最高纪录。

items.title: 从“照单生产”到定义潮流，义乌世界杯生意如何推陈出新？
items.summary: 原创周边批量上新，多个爆款走俏海外，商户揽单忙不停

items.title: Average retirement savings by state: Where are Americans saving the most — and least?
items.summary: （该来源未提供摘要，请点击查看原文）

items.title: Jensen Huang's staggering $4 trillion bet shifts Nvidia

items.title: 一男子向纽约市一联邦大楼投掷燃烧装置被拘留
items.summary: 中新网7月21日电 据美国有线电视新闻网报道，一名嫌疑人因涉嫌于20日上午向纽约市一联邦大楼投掷燃烧装置已被拘留。

items.title: 中国驻俄使馆发言人就中国公民在无人机袭击中受伤事答问
items.summary: 中新社莫斯科7月20日电 中国驻俄罗斯大使馆发言人20日就3名中国公民在莫斯科州无人机袭击中受伤事答问。

items.title: 俄外交部宣布对等驱逐意大利驻俄武官
items.summary: 中新社莫斯科7月20日电 俄罗斯外交部20日召见意大利驻俄临时代办，就意方此前“无理”驱逐俄罗斯驻意大使馆一名武官和一名助理武官提出抗议，并宣布对等驱逐意大利驻俄大使馆一名武官和一名助理武官。

items.title: 美国将对加拿大特定商品加征50%关税
items.summary: 中新网7月21日电 综合美联社、英国《金融时报》报道，美国总统特朗普20日宣布，对加拿大特定商品加征50%关税，这一措施将于30天后生效。

items.title: 一油化船在霍尔木兹海峡附近遭袭
items.summary: 一名海员20日晚提供的霍尔木兹海峡附近船舶无线电公共频道录音显示，一艘油化船在该海峡附近遭袭，燃油舱起火，船体冒出大量浓烟，船员已准备弃船。

items.title: Trump imposes 50% tariff on Canadian imports
items.summary: The duties mark a major escalation in trade tensions between the North American neighbours.

items.title: Yemen's Houthis announce 'maritime embargo' on Saudi Arabia
items.summary: The Houthis say the embargo begins immediately and is a response to a Saudi blockade of ports and airports in Yemen.

items.title: US launches fresh strikes on Iran, as Trump warns of retaliation for deaths of soldiers
items.summary: The US says the attacks were aimed at degrading Iran's capabilities to attack ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Notorious drug cartel leader Ismael Zambada sentenced to life in US prison
items.summary: Known as "El Mayo", the co-founder the Sinaloa Cartel was also ordered to pay $15bn after he admitted to sending vast amounts of drugs to the US.

items.title: Merger deal between Paramount and Warner Bros paused by judge
items.summary: US court temporarily stops Paramount and Warner Bros merging after 12 states launched legal action.

items.summary: Rebuild the object in a reference image as a code-only, procedural, quality-gated, animation-ready Three.js model. Token-efficient image-to-3D.
